status.description: The execution status of the pipeline.

a2ui_messages.description: A list of generated A2UI JSON messages (e.g., surfaceUpdate, dataModelUpdate, beginRendering).

generated_code.description: The Python matplotlib code generated for custom plot execution, if applicable.

bundled_file_path.description: The local file path to the standalone HTML bundle, if applicable.

interpretation_text.description: Scientific interpretation or AI suggestions generated alongside the UI.

error_details.description: Details of any validation or execution errors encountered.
